subcodes.first_line: O radiant assemblage of the land of Ṣád! For a time, your capacity was steadily increasing, until [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای انجمن نورانی ارض صاد مدتی بود روزبروز ازدیاد استعداد می یافت تا انگه این
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
